## Summary

## Tests

- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `node --test "tests/extension/**/*.test.cjs"`

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No cookies, credentials, API keys, browser profiles, or local session data are committed.
- [ ] Local server behavior still binds to `127.0.0.1` by default.
- [ ] Any new third-party assets are documented in `docs/THIRD_PARTY_ASSETS.md`.
